title: Shipping Policy
body_html:
Order processing. Most in-stock items ship within 1–2 business days. Made-to-order and personalized items (custom portraits, embroidered bandanas, engraved tags, printed apparel) are crafted just for you and ship in 5–10 business days.

Free shipping. Free standard shipping on orders over $40. Orders under $40 are charged a flat rate calculated at checkout based on weight and destination.

Delivery estimates (after processing). Standard: 3–7 business days. Expedited (where available): 2–3 business days.

Tracking. You'll receive a tracking link by email as soon as your order ships.

Questions? Email us at support@pawlette.shop.

title: Returns & Refunds
body_html:
We want you and your pup to love every Pawlette purchase. If something isn't right, we're here to help.

30-day satisfaction guarantee. Return eligible items within 30 days of delivery for a refund or exchange. Items must be unused, in original condition, and in their original packaging.

Personalized & made-to-order items (custom portraits, embroidered, engraved, and printed-to-order products) are final sale — unless they arrive damaged or defective, in which case we'll replace them free of charge.

How to start a return. Email support@pawlette.shop with your order number and reason. We'll send instructions and, where applicable, a return label. Once we receive and inspect the item, your refund is issued to the original payment method within 5–10 business days.

Damaged or wrong item? Send a photo to support@pawlette.shop within 7 days of delivery and we'll make it right immediately.

title: FAQ
body_html:
How long until my order arrives? In-stock items ship in 1–2 business days; personalized items in 5–10. After that, standard delivery is 3–7 business days.

How does personalization work? For custom items you'll enter your pet's name/details at checkout. For portraits, you'll upload a photo after ordering — we'll email you a link.

What if it doesn't fit? We offer exchanges within 30 days on non-personalized items. Check the size guide on each product page before ordering.

Are your products safe for pets? Yes. Our feeding and grooming items use food-grade, BPA-free, pet-safe materials. Always supervise your pet with any new product.

Can I change or cancel my order? Contact us within 12 hours of ordering at support@pawlette.shop. Once a personalized item enters production we can't change it.

Still have questions? Email support@pawlette.shop — we usually reply within one business day.

title: Our Story
body_html:
Pawlette started with one simple belief: the little things make a dog's life — and yours — better.

From slow-feeding lick mats that turn rushed meals into calm ones, to glow collars that make night walks safe, to hand-crafted portraits of the best friend who never leaves your side — every Pawlette product is chosen or made with one question in mind: would this make a tail wag?

Many of our pieces are made to order, so they're created the day you buy them and personalized just for your pup. Less waste, more meaning.

Thanks for being here. Your dog is lucky to have you — and we're lucky to be a small part of your story together. 🐾

— The Pawlette team
